s: In 2018, Jaime Schultz suited up for TBR as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.640, WHIP 1.150, SO 35, WAR -0.200.
Changed teams after the previous season (TBR -> LAD).
In 2019, Jaime Schultz suited up for LAD as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 7.200, WHIP 1.800, SO 3, WAR -0.100. Notable context: Joined LAD.
